transcript: Speaker A: ನಮಸ್ಕಾರ [Hello] Speaker B: ನಿಮ್ಮ ಹೆಸರೇನು? [What is your name?] Speaker A: My name is Rahul. Speaker B: ನಿಮ್ಮ ವಯಸ್ಸೆಷ್ಟು? [How old are you?] Speaker A: I have 22. Speaker B: I have 22 ಅಲ್ಲ, I am 22 years old ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Not 'I have 22', you should say 'I am 22 years old'.] Speaker A: Okay okay, I am 22 years old. Speaker B: ನೀವೆಲ್ಲಿಂದ ಬಂದಿದ್ದೀರಿ? [Where are you from?] Speaker A: I am Ballari. Speaker B: I am Ballari ಅಲ್ಲ, "I am from Ballari" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Not 'I am Ballari', you should say 'I am from Ballari'.] Speaker A: ಓ ಸರಿ ಸರಿ. ನನಗೆ English ಅಷ್ಟು ಬರೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [Oh okay okay. I don't know English that well.] Speaker B: ಪರವಾಗಿಲ್ಲ, AI Teachers ಟ್ರೈ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದೀರಾ? [No problem, have you tried AI Teachers?] Speaker A: ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಹಣ ಬೇಕಾಗುತ್ತೆ ಅಲ್ವಾ? [That requires a lot of money, right?] Speaker B: ಇಲ್ವೇ ಇಲ್ಲ, normal English classes ಗಿಂತ 7 ಪಟ್ಟು cheap. ಅದಕ್ಕಾಗಿ 1 ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ MySivi ನಲ್ಲಿ practice ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [Not at all, it is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing with me on MySivi.] Speaker A: ಆದ್ರೆ time ಸಿಗೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [But I don't get time.] Speaker B: ನೀವು 5-10 ನಿಮಿಷ practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು, ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ confidence ಹೆಚ್ಚಾಗುತ್ತೆ. [Just practicing for 5-10 minutes is enough, your confidence will increase bit by bit.] Speaker A: ಓ, ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು? [Oh, how to join?] Speaker B: ಕೆಳಗಿನ install button ಪ್ರೆಸ್ ಮಾಡಿ, MySivi app ಇನ್ಸ್ಟಾಲ್ ಮಾಡಿ, sign up ಮಾಡಿ, practice ಸ್ಟಾರ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡಿ. [Press the install button below, install the MySivi app, sign up, and start practicing.]
on_screen_text: ENGLISH BARALLA [English doesn't come], ನಮಸ್ಕಾರ [Hello], ನಿಮ್ಮ ಹೆಸರೇನು [What is your name], MY NAME IS RAHUL, ನಿಮ್ಮ ವಯಸ್ಸೆಷ್ಟು [How old are you], I HAVE 22, I HAVE 22 ಅಲ್ಲ [Not I HAVE 22], I AM 22 YEARS OLD ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು [Should say I AM 22 YEARS OLD], I AM 22 YEARS OLD, ನೀವೆಲ್ಲಿಂದ ಬಂದಿದ್ದೀರಿ [Where are you from], I AM BALLARI, I AM BALLARI ಅಲ್ಲ [Not I AM BALLARI], I AM FROM BALLARI ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು [Should say I AM FROM BALLARI], ನನಗೆ ENGLISH ಅಷ್ಟು ಬರೋದಿಲ್ಲ [I don't know English that well], Arya AI Teacher, Practice Now, Lessons completed, Fluency Score, Your Learning Path, Talk about anything, Daily routine, Let's Improve Vocabulary, Talk about your childhood, Seasons and weather, Family and Relationships, Hobbies and Interests, Talk about your workplace, ಹಣ ಬೇಕಾಗುತ್ತೆ [Money is needed], normal English classes ಗಿಂತ [Than normal English classes], 7 ಪಟ್ಟು cheap [7 times cheap], practice ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದಾರೆ [Are practicing], ಆದ್ರೆ time ಸಿಗೋದಿಲ್ಲ [But no time], ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ confidence ಹೆಚ್ಚಾಗುತ್ತೆ [Confidence increases bit by bit], ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು [How to join], MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: A young man with 'English Baralla' written on his back practices English with an AI robot on a screen. The AI corrects his grammar in real-time and explains that the MySivi app is 7 times cheaper than traditional classes. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the MySivi app for quick daily practice.
